info.description: The core orchestrator backend for ComfyUI generation scaling.
info.title: ComfyUI Backend API

post.description: Adds the specified amount to the team's credit balance. Admin only.

get.description: Returns the most recent generations across the entire system. Requires admin privileges. Supports filtering and cursor pagination.

parameters.description: Cursor: ID of the last generation from the previous page
parameters.name: before

parameters.description: Filter by status: queued, running, completed, failed, retrying
parameters.name: status

get.description: Returns all non-dead VM records stored in the internal database, giving a full snapshot of what the system believes is running. Admin only.
Returns available GPU inventory filtered by provider and instance types. Admin only.

parameters.description: Comma-separated instance types to filter by
parameters.name: types

get.description: Returns all active instances currently reported by the Mjolnir infrastructure aggregator across every provider. Admin only.

post.description: Enqueues a provider termination task (NeedsPost=false). Kills the VM at the provider without touching the database. Admin only.

delete.description: Enqueues the close-pre → terminate-at-provider → close-post pipeline for the given internal VM ID. Admin only.

post.description: Sets the VM state to dead and records a closing timestamp in the database. Does NOT interact with the provider. Admin only.

get.description: Returns uploaded media assets for the active team. Use ?limit= to control count (max 100, default 20). Pass ?before=<asset_id> to fetch the next page.

parameters.description: Cursor: ID of the last asset from the previous page
parameters.name: before

post.description: Verifies that the uploaded object exists in S3, checks available object metadata against the declared upload metadata, and marks the team asset as uploaded.
Creates a pending input asset for the active team and returns a short-lived pre-signed S3 PUT URL for direct client upload. The authenticated user is recorded as the uploader.

get.description: Returns a short-lived pre-signed S3 GET URL for an uploaded asset that belongs to the active team.
Returns the most recent batches for the active team. Use ?limit= to control count (max 100, default 20). Pass ?before=<id> to fetch the next page.

parameters.description: Cursor: ID of the last batch from the previous page
parameters.name: before

get.description: Returns batch progress counters and the full list of its generations.
Returns all generations belonging to the given batch.
Returns the current credit balance for the active team. The team is resolved from the X-Team-ID request header (preferred) or the team_id cookie. The caller must be an active member of that team.

400.description: X-Team-ID header or team_id cookie missing

403.description: Not an active member of the team

get.description: Returns the most recent credit ledger entries for the active team. Use ?limit= to control count (max 100, default 20).

post.description: Creates a batch of ComfyUI generations and enqueues them for processing.

get.description: Returns the most recent generations for the authenticated user. Use ?limit= to control count (max 100, default 20). Pass ?before=<id> to fetch the next page.

parameters.description: Cursor: ID of the last generation from the previous page
parameters.name: before

get.description: Retrieves the status of a specific generation and its result if completed.
Retrieves the localized user profile from the internal Postgres Shadow Table.
Returns enriched workflow views for all workflows owned by the active team.
Returns every team where the caller has an ACTIVE membership.

post.description: Creates a new team and adds the caller as the OWNER.

get.description: Returns team details. The caller must be an active member.
Returns all members of the given team. The caller must be an active member.

post.description: Adds a user to the team with the specified role. Requires OWNER or ADMIN.

delete.description: Sets a member's status to REMOVED. Requires OWNER or ADMIN. Cannot remove the last owner.

get.description: Returns a paginated, sorted list of public workflows for discovery.

post.description: Creates a new ComfyUI workflow owned by the active team.

get.description: Returns an enriched workflow view. Accessible if the workflow belongs to the active team or is public.

patch.description: Applies a partial update to a workflow. Only provided fields are changed.

post.description: Listener for incoming asynchronous Clerk event webhooks. It aggressively verifies payloads via Svix Cryptography.

attachments.description: Ignored by DB, handled manually via JSONB byte mapping in Repo.
